title: maffin smp
body:
**A simple resource pack what adds items with CIT.**
# Item list
**Muffin tools:**
 - Muffin axe
 - Muffin axe silk
 - Muffin pickaxe
 - Muffin pickaxe silk
 - Muffin shovel
 - Muffin sword
 - Muffin hoe

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![muffin tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1504b2ca56d99bea06a756b15bc193856b90072d.png)

</details>


**Void tools (wip):**
 - the void axe
 - lucky void pickaxe
 - soft void pickaxe
 - blade of the void 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![void tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c569cfaf2458e38ba8a488b46cb8fcf16e5095e.png)

</details>


**Food:**
 - muffin
 - onigiri

![food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb25cfa06a17673e8e6f13eab83a68e1fb10d562.png)

</details>
